title: Squid ICAP and eCAP Adaptation Failures
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="squid:cache"
| regex _raw="(?i)(ICAP|ECAP).*(?:fail|error|timeout)"
| bin _time span=5m
| stats count by _time, host
| where count > 10
description: Adaptation failures look like random web errors to users.
value: Protects both security coverage and productivity.
implementation: Tune service timeouts; scale scanners horizontally when counts rise.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We see when security scanners slow or break browsing.
